title: Close dashboard truth chain with final ownership proof
objective: Prove the current dashboard truth model is complete and close the remaining task chain cleanly. Apply only the smallest safe fix if a final ownership mismatch still exists.
acceptance_criteria: current dashboard truth model is clearly proven and documented
any final tiny mismatch is fixed
older dashboard truth tasks are mapped as completed or superseded
result clearly states whether the chain is now CLOSED
rollback: Revert dashboard.html only if the tiny ownership fix must be undone.
